# Souhail Benlhachemi

> Full-stack Product Engineer based in Agadir, Morocco — building products from idea to production using the JS/TS ecosystem.

Souhail is a full-stack engineer with 3+ years of experience shipping SaaS platforms, desktop apps, automation tools, and component libraries and 6+ years coding. Former indie founder (20+ projects). Currently part-time technical co-founder at Octolead. Open to remote engineering roles.

## Sitemap

- [Full content](https://benlhachemi.github.io/llms-full.txt): Complete text of the entire website
- [About](https://benlhachemi.github.io/llms.txt/about): Background, tech stack, experience, philosophy, and featured projects
- [Projects](https://benlhachemi.github.io/llms.txt/projects): All projects (short version)
- [Services](https://benlhachemi.github.io/llms.txt/services): Available services and what Souhail offers
- [Contact](https://benlhachemi.github.io/llms.txt/contact): How to get in touch
- [CV](https://benlhachemi.github.io/cv.pdf): CV in PDF format

## Projects

List of all projects by details

- [DailyHabit](https://benlhachemi.github.io/llms.txt/projects/dailyhabit): Habit tracker app, runs 100% client-side
- [Root UI v2 (Shadcn)](https://benlhachemi.github.io/llms.txt/projects/root-ui): Premium Shadcn Components, Blocks and Themes.
- [Clipzr](https://benlhachemi.github.io/llms.txt/projects/clipzr): Windows screen recorder with smooth cursor movements.
- [Root UI v1 (React-aria)](https://benlhachemi.github.io/llms.txt/projects/root-ui-v1): React component library built on top of React Aria & TailwindCSS.
- [Kolors](https://benlhachemi.github.io/llms.txt/projects/kolors): Color palette generator for design systems with primitive shades and semantic mappings.
- [BerryPoints](https://benlhachemi.github.io/llms.txt/projects/berrypoints): Reward-based advertising platform where users earn money by completing offers.
- [Fox Wallpapers](https://benlhachemi.github.io/llms.txt/projects/fox-wallpapers): Windows Live Wallpaper Engine built using Tauri (React + Rust).
- [NextJs SaaS Landing Page](https://benlhachemi.github.io/llms.txt/projects/next-saas-landing-page): Free saas landing page built using next.js, tailwind and framer-motion (100/100 Lightouse score).
- [Framist](https://benlhachemi.github.io/llms.txt/projects/framist): Rapid prototyping tool to create interactive, native-feeling app prototypes in minutes without code.
- [PizzaSlice](https://benlhachemi.github.io/llms.txt/projects/pizzaslice): ProductHunt for indie game developers. Browse, filter, and discover indie games through video previews.
- [Comsep](https://benlhachemi.github.io/llms.txt/projects/comsep): AI-powered domain name generator with real-time WHOIS availability checking.
- [CPAVid](https://benlhachemi.github.io/llms.txt/projects/cpavid): Automated YouTube video creation and uploading system using Remotion and Puppeteer.
- [RandomCall](https://benlhachemi.github.io/llms.txt/projects/randomcall): Full-stack random 1-on-1 video chat app like Omegle/Chatroulette with WebSocket matchmaking.
- [BestShape](https://benlhachemi.github.io/llms.txt/projects/bestshape): Personalized fitness program generator in 30 seconds via a multi-step questionnaire.
- [Edumation](https://benlhachemi.github.io/llms.txt/projects/edumation): AI-powered educational assistant platform for students and educators.
- [Brand Name Generator](https://benlhachemi.github.io/llms.txt/projects/brand-name-generator): AI-powered brand name generator using fine-tuned GPT-3.5 with domain and social handle checking.
- [Modifio](https://benlhachemi.github.io/llms.txt/projects/modifio): Client-side file converter powered by FFmpeg WASM.
- [NextJs Tailwind Portfolio](https://benlhachemi.github.io/llms.txt/projects/nextjs-tailwind-portfolio): Personal dark-themed portfolio with Lottie animations, glassmorphism, and Tailwind CSS.
- [Nest Cloaker](https://benlhachemi.github.io/llms.txt/projects/nest-cloaker): Affiliate marketing URL cloaking API with device fingerprinting and network filtering.
- [One-page e-commerce](https://benlhachemi.github.io/llms.txt/projects/one-page-ecommerce): Single-page e-commerce storefront with WhatsApp ordering for a Moroccan business.
- [Eagle Browser](https://benlhachemi.github.io/llms.txt/projects/eagle-browser): RESTful API for managing browser profiles with proxy, fingerprint, and data directory configuration.
- [Arduino NodeJs](https://benlhachemi.github.io/llms.txt/projects/arduino-nodejs): IoT web controller bridging Node.js with Arduino via serial communication.
- [Dofus Marchand Bot](https://benlhachemi.github.io/llms.txt/projects/dofus-marchand-bot): Desktop automation bot for Dofus using OpenCV template matching to automate merchant mode.
- [Era.js](https://benlhachemi.github.io/llms.txt/projects/era-js): Opinionated Node.js backend framework and CLI tool for scaffolding Express-based REST APIs.
- [CPADominator](https://benlhachemi.github.io/llms.txt/projects/cpadominator): Full-stack SaaS for creating content-locked landing pages used in CPA/affiliate marketing.
- [YouTube Views Bot](https://benlhachemi.github.io/llms.txt/projects/youtube-cheater): Node.js bot that automates fake YouTube video views using Puppeteer with stealth techniques.
- [Fingerprint JS](https://benlhachemi.github.io/llms.txt/projects/fingerprint-js): Client-side browser fingerprinting library generating unique device IDs from 18 browser signals.
- [CPA Analytics](https://benlhachemi.github.io/llms.txt/projects/cpa-analytics): Full-stack CPA marketing analytics platform to track visitor behavior on landing pages.
- [LME](https://benlhachemi.github.io/llms.txt/projects/lme): Full-stack CMS for a university research laboratory with admin dashboard.
- [React Node Auth](https://benlhachemi.github.io/llms.txt/projects/react-node-auth): Full-stack MERN authentication app with Passport.js local strategy, session-based auth, and a React frontend.
- [Quotex Auto Trader](https://benlhachemi.github.io/llms.txt/projects/quotex-auto-trader): Chrome extension to automate trading actions on the Quotex platform.
